items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for 'Engagement scoring for follow-up segmentation'. However, the provided evidence does not include any specific details or endpoints that demonstrate how engagement scoring is implemented or tracked. As a result, it is not possible to confirm whether the requirement is satisfied or identify any gaps.
